# Expressive JSX
> Build-time CSS-in-JS for React using JavaScript labels.

## Full Documentation
- [Overview & contributor guide](/llm/SKILL.md): Canonical agent documentation for Expressive JSX.

## References
- [Authoring Syntax](/llm/references/authoring-syntax.md): Component syntax, values, macros, automatic behavior, gotchas.
- [Install And Bootstrap](/llm/references/install-bootstrap.md): Consumer setup, repo bootstrap, skill installation.
- [Architecture](/llm/references/architecture.md): Transformation pipeline, contexts, labels, macros, CSS output.
- [Testing](/llm/references/testing.md): Test layout, parser snapshots, commands, guardrails.
